doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document contains a future date and asserts a legal interpretation of the GDPR that contradicts settled CJEU jurisprudence regarding pseudonymized data.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 100
REASON: The document is dated in the future (2026), and its central legal claim contradicts established CJEU jurisprudence (such as Breyer) regarding the definition of personal data.
